summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProspectRadar lead generation MVP. Backend APIs working well (95.2% success rate), frontend UI fully functional with excellent integration. AI pitch/proposal generation working via OpenAI GPT-5.2. Only minor issue with WhatsApp Twilio authorization.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats cards (Total Leads, Hot Leads, Closed Deals, Revenue Opportunity)
Scan New Leads button triggers mock lead scan and adds new leads (found 3 new leads)
Lead list displays with proper Hot/Warm/Cold badges and status badges
Filter by status, score, and country works correctly
Search leads by name/industry/city works
Add Lead modal opens and creates new lead manually
Click on lead row navigates to lead detail page
Lead detail page shows Website Audit with proper 'No Website Found' display
Generate Pitch button calls AI and displays generated pitch (982 chars)
Generate Proposal button calls AI and displays generated proposal (4440 chars)
Status dropdown changes lead status (tested New to Contacted)
Send Email modal opens (mocked due to no Resend API key - expected)
Send WhatsApp modal opens and UI works
Find Domains button loads domain suggestions (9 domains found)
Edit lead modal functionality (UI tested)
Delete lead confirmation works
Domain Finder page searches for domain suggestions (9 results)
Settings page displays integration status correctly
Navigation between pages works (Dashboard, Domain Finder, Settings)
All backend API endpoints working (20/21 tests passed)
Lead CRUD operations fully functional
AI generation using OpenAI GPT-5.2 working
Mock lead scanning working (Google Maps/Reddit/Facebook simulation)
Domain suggestions API working
Stats endpoint providing accurate data
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WhatsApp Twilio authorization issue - check Twilio credentials and account permissions. All other functionality working perfectly.
